description: Repos under ~/Desktop/CLAUDE CODE/ that look like skills but aren't. Tree walker skips these when discovering audit targets. Each entry is the directory name. Keep this list small — only add after verifying the repo legitimately doesn't fit the skill pattern (no SKILL.md by design, or structurally different purpose).

excluded.name: blue-hill-capital
excluded.reason: Fund governance + data repo. Fund skills (royal-rumble, chief-of-staff, accuracy-tracker, price-desk, fundamentals-desk, technicals-desk, journalist) read from / write to this repo — but it is not itself a Claude skill.

excluded.name: claude-sessions
excluded.reason: Session archive (12,429+ message logs indexed by date/topic). Not invoked as a skill; consumed by .archive and /time-machine skills.

excluded.name: DimmMak.github.io
excluded.reason: Jekyll blog (minimal-mistakes theme). Not a skill; published via GitHub Pages.

excluded.name: the-overhaul
excluded.reason: Case study repo documenting the 3-axis overhaul architecture. Reference material, not a skill.

excluded.name: cowork-recipes
excluded.reason: Recipe collection for Claude Cowork automations. Markdown + shell snippets; not invoked as a Claude skill.
